title: rubus obtruncatus subsp. horrens
intro: Rubus obtruncatus subsp. horrens, also known as the thorny raspberry or Himalayan raspberry, is a type of bramble plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and other nutrients that provide several health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Rubus obtruncatus subsp. horrens include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
